summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Local Lead Systems landing page with new contractor-focused content, pricing model, and lead capture system

ui_bugs.issue: CTA button has element stability issues causing timeout on click
ui_bugs.details: Button appears to have animation or loading states causing click instability

passed_tests: Landing page loads successfully with Local Lead Systems branding
Hero section displays 'GET A FREE WEBSITE CHECK' CTA button
Problem section shows 'THE LEAKY BUCKET' with 4 pain points
3-Step Solution section displays 'Simple. No Gimmicks.' messaging
What You Get section is present and functional
New pricing model correctly shows $500 setup + $150/month
ROI calculator displays accurate values ($5,000+ job, $2,300 annual cost, 1 job break-even)
Industries section shows all 6 trade icons (Deck Builders, Fence Installers, Landscapers, Tree Removal, Painters, Roofers)
Lead form includes all required fields (name, business, phone, email, website, service type)
Service dropdown contains new contractor types (Deck Building, Fence Installation, etc.)
Hero CTA button successfully scrolls to form
Navigation menu works for How It Works, Pricing, FAQ sections
Form fields can be filled with contractor information
Service selection dropdown is interactive and functional
